steps.title: Find the cause and result
steps.content: The first sentence says Al-Andalus was ruled for centuries by Arabic-speaking Muslim states. The second sentence says Arabic words entered Spanish, so the transition must show that this language influence was a result of that history.

steps.title: Check the transition choices
steps.content: B would narrow a category, but the second sentence gives an outcome. C would introduce an example, but the first sentence does not state a general set of examples. D signals contrast or replacement, which does not fit. A result transition is needed. The answer is A.
